title: SessionEnd hook that writes a session summary episode
userStory: As Steve, I want every Claude Code session in personal/ summarised into the graph so that 'what did I work on yesterday' has a real answer.
acceptanceCriteria: Hook reads the session transcript via Claude Code env var
Calls Claude Haiku with prompt: 'summarize this session in 3-5 sentences focused on what was decided, what was built, what is still open'
POSTs the summary to Graphiti as an episode named 'Session: {first 40 chars of first user prompt} - {date}', body=summary, entity_hints={surface: claude_code, repo: <cwd basename>}
Verify: open a session in personal/, do something, close; in a new session ask 'what did I work on yesterday in this repo?' returns the summary
